hero.title: Welcome to our Rabbit Farm!
hero.description: Every rabbit deserves a loving home!

services.title: Our Services
services.nutritiousFoodDesc: High-quality food for rabbits that ensures a healthy life.
services.rabbitCareDesc: Comprehensive care packages for all your rabbit needs.
services.vaccinationDesc: Protection against common diseases to keep your rabbit healthy.

adopt.title: Adopt a Bunny, Give It a Happy Home

profiles.title: Find Your Furry Friend Here
profiles.noRabbits: No rabbits available at the moment.

vision.title: Our Vision And Mission
vision.visionText: To be the leading shelter for rabbits and ensure their well-being through a loving environment.

reviews.title: Rabbit Lovers Review
reviews.review1: A wonderful place for adopting rabbits. They took such good care of my bunny!
reviews.review2: The best rabbit shelter in town! Very loving and dedicated staff.

servicesPage.description: Orders in our plastic, welding and woodworking shops are prepared by professional craftsmen with modern equipment. Quality, safety and durability are our main priorities.

servicesPage.detailsFallback: Visit the section for detailed information.
servicesPage.orderNote: To place an order and get a price

serviceDetail.notFoundDesc: No matching service found in the database for this page.
